_comment: Financial-intelligence feed (redesigned 2026-07-23, replacing the old 4x/day world-news recap entirely). 4 checkpoints/day (02:00/06:00/12:00/21:00 Brussels, src/triggers/ai_manager.py's _CALL_CHECKPOINT_HOURS). Each call fetches a large pool of crypto/finance/AI candidate articles (candidate_pool_size) and has Claude score every one on a 0-100 rubric (market impact, surprise, AI relevance, retail interest, viral potential, long-term importance -- see ai_manager_brain.py's prompt). Score >= individual_post_min_score gets its own full post (market card: hook + why-it-matters + tickers + impact/confidence/horizon + bottom line); score in [digest_min_score, individual_post_min_score) gets bundled into a numbered digest thread, but only if at least digest_min_items qualify combined -- otherwise the digest is skipped entirely, same 'don't post a thin version' philosophy as everything else on this account. max_calls_per_day matches the 4 checkpoints so every one can actually fire.
